title: PackagedAstral
body:
PackagedAstral is an addon to PackagedAuto and Astral Sorcery, and it adds the ability to automatically craft items made using altars from Astral Sorcery. This mod is designed to be able to run without Applied Energistics 2, but installation with it is recommended.

This mod adds many crafters. To use them, construct their respective altar structures, put an Unpackager next to one, and have the Unpackager handle respective crafting recipes, which can be encoded into recipe holders with the Encoder. The Iridescent crafter requires a sufficient amount of Marked Relays. The crafters, when connected to a ME Network, will automatically eject outputs into the network.

Note for the 1.16 version: The crafters will only output the first output in altar recipes if there are multiple outputs.
